response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.20 below threshold but my conservative policy requires 0.55 minimum reserve; sharing 0.5 kWh would breach my safety margin and I cannot guarantee reciprocal support when needed.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in genuine need (SoC 35–45%) and reciprocate requests; I must preserve my own margin before sharing..
